turns.name: CHIEF JUSTICE REHNQUIST
turns.text: I have the judgment of the Court to announce in the No. 85-1217, City of Springfield versus Kibbe. For reasons stated in a Per Curiam opinion file with the Clerk, the writ of certiorari is dismissed as improvidently granted. Justice O'Connor has filed a dissenting opinion in which I, Justice White, and Justice Powell have joined.
